fundamentals.name: MongoDB, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: MongoDB, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, provides general purpose database platform worldwide. The company offers MongoDB Atlas, a hosted multi-cloud database-as-a-service solution; MongoDB Enterprise Advanced, a commercial database server for enterprise customers to run in the cloud, on-premises, or in a hybrid environment; and Community Server, a free-to-download version of its database, which includes the functionality that developers need to get started with MongoDB. It offers professional services comprising consulting and training. The company was formerly known as 10gen, Inc. and changed its name to MongoDB, Inc. in August 2013. MongoDB, Inc. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in New York, New York.

judgment.summary: A high-growth company with strong revenue expansion and free cash flow, but currently unprofitable on a net basis and trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 12.1%; next earnings date is 2026-05-28.
positives: Revenue growth 26.7% YoY, with analyst estimates for current Q and FY above 17%.
Gross margin of 71.7% indicates strong pricing power and efficient core operations.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $463.32M demonstrates healthy cash generation.
Total cash of $2.39B provides ample liquidity, with low total debt of $62.83M.
Strong analyst consensus of 'buy' with a mean target price of $358.82.
negatives: Operating margin of 0.0% and profit margin of -2.9% indicate the company is not yet profitable.
Return on equity (-2.5%) and return on assets (-2.4%) are negative.
Forward P/E of 46.05x and Price/Sales of 10.66x suggest a high valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 2.13 is elevated, though offset by strong cash reserves.

news.paragraph: MongoDB's Instruqt platform was highlighted by Google Cloud Security for training practitioners on Agentic AI at Google Next 2026, indicating strong adoption and integration within a major cloud ecosystem. This follows recent analyst optimism and a significant one-year rally, with the company's valuation and AI momentum supporting its share price. Investors are watching the upcoming earnings report on May 28th, which follows a recent EPS beat.

headlines.title: Google Cloud Security Uses Instruqt Platform to Train 150+ Practitioners on Agentic AI at Google Next 2026
